hero.label: Hybrid AI Platform
hero.title: Driving AX Innovation
hero.description: GEN AI Platform is the all-in-one AI platform where you can train models, design intelligent agentflows with drag & drop, and serve them as APIs — effortlessly.

features.title: Why XGEN?
features.subtitle: Innovative features that set a new standard for AI agentflow development

visualCanvas.title: Visual Canvas Editor
visualCanvas.description: Compose complex AI agentflows visually with intuitive drag and drop, and preview them in real-time.

realtimeChat.title: Real-time AI Chat
realtimeChat.description: Have natural conversations with your completed agentflows and see AI responses in real-time.

smartManagement.title: Smart Management Center
smartManagement.description: Provides an integrated management environment for agentflow performance monitoring, execution log analysis, and team collaboration.

highPerformance.title: High-Performance Engine
highPerformance.description: Optimized execution engine processes even large-scale agentflows quickly and reliably.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Enterprise-grade security and data protection features ensure a safe AI agentflow environment.

openEcosystem.title: Open Ecosystem
openEcosystem.description: Easily integrate various AI models and services with an extensible plugin system.
